However, option C is closer as well since many modern profiles indeed target mid-range speeds between 300-500 RPM to balance precision with operational efficiency without going too fast where vibrations could become an issue.

Answer: C You make valid points regarding the importance of balancing precision and vibration control through optimal rotation speeds.
